title: Peña Nieto Presidency Update — Apr 19, 2026
summary: New post-presidency era added to the timeline covering five key legal developments: the FGR's July 2025 Pegasus bribery investigation alleging $25M paid to Peña Nieto, the judicial stalemate in the Lozoya/Odebrecht case as of February 2025, the SCJN's definitive acquittal of Rosario Robles in the Estafa Maestra case, and new Ayotzinapa investigation lines targeting Iguala funeral homes. The Tomás Zerón extradition from Israel remains stalled despite a court ratifying his arrest warrant in August 2025. Eight new daily event files created for 2025–2026 developments; claims and political sections updated with current status.
